description: Curated Landmark Judgment file. Hand-verified court precedents with full official citations. The model may cite a judgment only from this file and may never invent or generalise case law.

judgments.case_name: Maneka Gandhi v. Union of India
judgments.holding: Article 21 'procedure established by law' must be just, fair and reasonable.

judgments.case_name: K.S. Puttaswamy (Retd.) v. Union of India
judgments.holding: The right to privacy is a fundamental right under Article 21.

judgments.case_name: D.K. Basu v. State of West Bengal
judgments.holding: Mandatory safeguards on arrest and detention to prevent custodial abuse.
Guidelines against sexual harassment of women at the workplace.
